He's also been part of two legendary radio shows, the Ron and Ron Radio Network and the Ron and Fez show. All of that experience comes together for Bennington. Three hours of talk entertainment with nationally known comedians. His co-host is Gail Bennington who has literally grown up in the buisness of comedy. It's fun, edgy and covers everything in comedy today. What ESPN is to sports, Bennington is to comedy. Weekdays 12pm-3pm ET

name: Rosebud Baker
bio: Rosebud Baker is a stand-up comedian based in New York City. She was named a New Face at the Just for Laughs festival and has appeared on The Tonight Show. She's a regular at the Comedy Cellar and released her debut album Whiskey Sour. Known for her dark, unflinching comedy.
bio_stand: Rosebud Baker is a New York-based comedian, actress, and writer who was recently selected as a New Face of Comedy at Montreal's prestigious Just For Laughs Comedy Festival 2018. In 2016, Rosebud was the winner of the New York Comedy Competition at New York Comedy Club, and a finalist in New York’s She-Devil Comedy Festival. She has been listed as one of the Top 10 comics to regularly perform on “Roastmasters” at The Stand Comedy Club. The Village Voice included her as one of “The Best of Just For Laughs New Faces Showcase“ stating 'Rosebud Baker brought serious New York vibes to her set; you could practically smell the stale cigarette smoke when she stepped out onto the stage...Baker’s no-nonsense, wickedly dirty routine cut through the evening like barbed wire.' Rosebud is a Staff Writer for the online news platform Elite Daily, and co-hosts the weekly podcast, “Two Less Lonely Girls” with Corinne Fischer. She regularly performs live at The Stand NYC.
tagline_cellar: WRITER FOR SATURDAY NIGHT LIVE UPDATE, COMEDY CENTRAL SPECIAL: "WHISKEY FISTS", "LIFE &BETH" ON HULU, "THAT DAMN MICHAEL CHE", ON HBO

name: Ryan Beck
bio_stand: Ryan Beck is a New York City based comedian from St. Louis, Missouri. Ryan is a regular at the Comedy Cellar in New York and his stand up has been featured on Comedy Central. Ryan has also performed in the New York Comedy Festival, Brooklyn Comedy Festival, and Limestone Comedy Festival. Ryan is a former digital creator for Comedy Central and has appeared on MTV’s Girl Code, Comedy Central’s Alternatino, This Week At The Comedy Cellar, and The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. He's been heard on The Bob and Tom Show and Sirius XM. As a writer, he’s contributed to the Comedy Central Roasts of Bob Saget, Roseanne Barr and James Franco and The Road to Roast Battle. Ryan has also written for the Snapchat original animated series Death Hacks. He has written and produced his web series #RyanBeckShow and the interactive short film We Need To Talk. He is a graduate of the University of Missouri.
bio: Ryan Beck is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Ryan Long
bio: Ryan Long is a stand-up comedian and YouTuber. His sketch comedy videos have gone viral, and he co-hosts The Boyscast podcast. He performs at clubs in NYC and tours nationally.
bio_stand: Ryan Long is a Comedian and Filmmaker from Toronto, Canada, currently living and working in New York City. He is currently the Creator, Star and Showrunner of the hit digital series ‘Torontopia’ on CBC Comedy, now in it's third season, and has been seen on Netflix, NBC, MTV, Fuse TV, and TheScore, to name a few. Ryan also created and starred in Bite TV’s original half hour TV Series ‘Ryan Long is Challenged’, nominated for two Canadian Comedy Awards, the award nominated TV series ‘Crown the Town with Ryan Long’ on Rogers TV, and the CBC Comedy digital series 'That Guy'. Ryan is the Head of Video at thehardtimes.net, the fastest growing satire site in the world, where he created the video department from scratch, and has released hours of viral videos, web-series, and celebrity driven branded content. Ryan has now amassed more than 30 Million views on the web, received the 'Fan Choice Award' at the CBC Comedy Coup for his pilot 'Blackwater Music' and in 2017 was nominated for 'Director of the Year' at The Notable Awards. As a comedian Ryan has released two cutting edge standup specials, headlines clubs across North America, and has performed at the Just for Laughs festival, NXNE, Sirius XM’s Top Comic, and toured with names like Tom Green, Steve-O, Kenny vs Spenny, The Trailer Park Boys and more. Ryan's podcast 'Fckonomics' was nominated for 'Podcast of the Year' by NOW magazine and has more than 100K downloads of it's close to 200 episodes. Lastly, Ryan was the singer of legendary punk band The Johnstones, who released 4 records on Stomp/Warner, charted at Much Music / MTV Charts, and in record sales, and toured the world from clubs to stadiums to a huge cult following. In 2019 the culmination of Ryan's successful career allowed him to immigrate to America with the 'Extraordinary Alien' Greencard where he is quickly making a name for himself in the New York club scene while continuing to prolifically produce content for platforms of all kinds.
tagline_cellar: NETFLIX, NBC, MTV, JFL, THE BOYSCAST

name: Ryan Sickler
bio: Ryan Sickler is a stand-up comedian and podcaster. He hosts The HoneyDew podcast and has appeared on multiple late night shows. Known for his storytelling about his chaotic upbringing.
bio_stand: Ryan Sickler is well known as the host of The HoneyDew Podcast, which features stand-ups and story tellers, shedding comedic light on life's lowest points. He has also appeared on several other major podcasts, including The Joe Rogan Experience and Your Mom's House. Ryan’s 2018 album, Get a Hold of Yourself, hit #1 standup album on the Billboard charts as well as #1 Comedy Album on the iTunes charts. In 2020 & 2021, Ryan was the Consulting Producer for the Unprotected Sets standup specials on Epix. Ryan was also the Supervising Producer on Season 2 of Kevin Hart’s award-winning Donald Mac series and the Co-Executive Producer of the E! series, The Funny Dance Show. He was also the Senior Producer on the Comedy Central Series, The Comedy Jam.

name: Saaniya Abbas
bio_stand: Saaniya Abbas is a Dubai-based comedian and storyteller whose rise from sheltered good girl to globe-trotting cutie has captured audiences across continents. Her comedy is a cheeky rebellion - warm, witty, and rooted in the grey spaces most people skip past. She’s toured the UK and India, amassed a global online following, and will be performing her debut solo hour at the Edinburgh Fringe this year. Whether on stage or in pixels, Saaniya is unpacking the real world and her place in it, mic in hand.
bio: Saaniya Abbas is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. She performs at clubs across the city.

name: Sahib Singh
tagline_cellar: COMEDY CENTRAL, ADULT SWIM, JFL NEW FACES
bio_stand: Sahib Singh is a rising star of the Baltimore/D.C. stand-up scene. He has performed at clubs and colleges across the East Coast, and in 2019, he won the Magooby’s New Comedian of the Year competition. His original videos have earned him a strong following on social media, and in 2021, he worked as a writer and performer for Comedy Central. His work has been featured on the CBS Comedy Showcase and the digital series AS SEEN ON ADULT SWIM.

name: Salma Hindy
bio_stand: Salma Hindy is a NYC-based comedian, actor, and writer. She stars as the lead voice in Ramy Youssef’s new A24/Amazon adult animated series, #1 Happy Family USA, recently nominated for a Gotham TV Award for Breakthrough Comedy Series. She has opened for Chelsea Handler on two tours. Salma is the creator and host of the rapidly growing podcast The Secret Sex Lives of Muslim Women, and she produces and headlines the monthly NYC comedy show Not My Father’s Daughter around daddy issues. Her debut comedy album, Born on 9/11, has been playing on SiriusXM since 2022 and received strong critical praise. She is also a Canadian Screen Award winner for her writing on CBC’s This Hour Has 22 Minutes. Her TEDx Talk, “Why People Pleasing is Hurting You,” has resonated with audiences internationally and explores the emotional origin of her comedy career.
bio: Salma Hindy is a stand-up comedian based in New York City. She performs at clubs across the city.

name: Sam Jay
bio: Sam Jay is a stand-up comedian and writer. She was a writer on Saturday Night Live and released her Netflix special 3 in the Morning. She hosted the HBO series Pause with Sam Jay. Known for her sharp, honest comedy about relationships, race, and culture.
bio_stand: Sam Jay is an emerging stand up comedian, actress, and speaker who hones her skills on the Boston comedy scene. Now a resident of Los Angeles, Sam is considered one of the industry’s hottest up-and-coming talents and she was selected as one of Comedy Central’s Comics To Watch in 2015. In addition to headlining some of the best comedy festival across the country, Sam is the star of Viceland’s new TV series ‘Flop House.’ As a queer woman of color, Sam is breaking ground in comedy every day. When asked how long she has been doing comedy Samaria Sam Jay Johnson smiles and replies 'For as long as I could speak'. Hailing from Boston MA a city that is no stranger to comedic prowess; a place that can lay claim to the comedic talents of Jay Leno, Louis C.K., Conan O'Brien and many others, Sam Jay is setting her own stage. Some would say the fact that she's female, African American, and a lesbian has allowed her to stand out in a male dominated industry. But it is more so how she can take these experiences and make them not only funny but relatable. Witty, candid, and raw she is bringing about a brand of comedy that has yet to be seen. Provoking audiences by pushing their thinking while still giving her sets the feel of a barroom conversation with one of your funniest friends. Her familiar personality on and off stage has allowed her to build quite the buzz in and around Boston comedy circles. Her 2013 invite to Laugh Your Asheville Off Comedy Festival and her 2014 acceptance into the Women In Comedy Festival as well as a stellar performance at the auditions for BET Comic View return to TV has got the industry insiders buzzing about this young lady. Opening for power house/veteran acts like Joe Clair BET, Hannibal Burres Comedy Central, and Rob StapletonComedy Central has not only helped this rising star hone her skills but has allowed her to branch out booking shows up and down the east coast. Performing at comedic institutions like Gotham NYC to the Comedy Studio in Cambridge Ma. Sam Johnson is wowing audiences and building her fan base. Her fresh, unique and warm approach makes Sam Jay a comedian worth seeing and one you will be talking about long after you do.

name: Sara Huntington
bio_stand: Sara is awkwardly fierce. She’s a lovely balance between self-depreciating and an absolute joy. She is edgy and hits topics of relationships and growing up in the country. She’s a viral sensation on social media as sarapoptarts. Sara started making videos online because she was a stand-up comic living in Indiana but desperate to be seen. She’s headlined clubs around the Midwest and performed at festivals such as Rise Comedy Festival and Let’s Fest Comedy. Outside of comedy she enjoys cats, smelling candles, and dipping sauces.
bio: Sara Huntington is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. She performs at clubs across the city.

name: Sara Weinshenk
bio_stand: Sara Weinshenk is a LA-based comedian, writer and podcaster. Since starting stand up in 2010, she has made many loyal fans from her stand up, as well as her podcast, SHENK. Sara can be seen on her digital series on the comedy central, "Shenks For Smoking" and has appeared on Deathsquad podcasts, JRE, GAS DIGITAL, and Lights Out With David Spade on Comedy Central
bio: Sara Weinshenk is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. She performs at clubs across the city.

name: Sarah Sherman
bio_wiki: Sarah Nicole Sherman, also known professionally as Sarah Squirm, is an American comedian, actress, and screenwriter. Sherman is known for using surreal and body horror comedy. She became a featured player on the NBC sketch comedy series Saturday Night Live starting with its 47th season in October 2021, and was promoted to repertory status in October 2023.
bio: Sarah Sherman is a stand-up comedian and cast member on Saturday Night Live. Known for her absurdist, gross-out comedy style and memorable SNL sketches. She performs regularly at NYC comedy clubs.

name: Sasha Merci
bio_stand: Second-generation Dominican American comedian, actress, and digital creator Sasha Merci is a Bronx native now based in Los Angeles. Sasha can be seen starring in the feature film De Lo Mio (HBO), her very own series Like, Subscribe Demilo (FUSE), and in the popular web-series Group Therapy (COMPLEX). Sasha has amassed a social media following of over 180k and has collaborated with brands like Bumble, AT&T, Heineken, Old Spice and many more. Last year Sasha was selected as one of Freeform TV's #YoungBlackAndFreeform inaugural honoree's which celebrates diverse content creators and thought leaders, and this year you can catch her starring in the feature film SHELTER opposite Lisa Vidal and Cam Gigandet.
bio: Sasha Merci is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. She performs at clubs across the city.

name: Sean Donnelly
tagline_cellar: FROM THE TONIGHT SHOW, FROM THE LATE SHOW WITH STEPHEN COLBERT,  THE DAVID LETTERMAN SHOW, CONAN O'BRIEN, COMEDY CENTRAL HALF HOUR SPECIAL
bio_stand: When he’s not catching a nap with his bulldog, Rickles, Sean can be found headlining clubs and festivals all over the country. He has appeared on The Late Show with David Letterman, Conan and NBC’s Last Comic Standing. Sean co-hosts the podcast My Dumb Friends with fellow comedian Dan St. Germain on the All Things Comedy network. He released his debut comedy album “Manual Labor Face” in 2015 on Comedy Central Records. Sean has been featured on the truTV series World’s Dumbest and Almost Genius as well as Adam Devine’s House Party, The Half Hour, Broad City, and Inside Amy Schumer on Comedy Central, Amazon’s Alpha House, GSN’s Lie Detectors, Limitless on CBS, and Billions on Showtime.

name: Sean Millea
bio_stand: From New Jersey and an alumni of the NYU film program, Sean is best known for his many viral comedy videos across Youtube, Tiktok, and Instagram. His wide range of content has received over 100 million views, garnering him more than a million followers across all of his platforms. He has opened for comedians like Mark Normand and Trevor Wallace, had a brief appearance on the Tim Dillon podcast with Gary Vee, and even went viral for winning the “musical chairs boxing” tournament at the Skankfest comedy festival - dubbing him the nickname “Bowie”.
bio: Sean Millea is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Sean Patton
bio: Sean Patton is a stand-up comedian from New Orleans. He's appeared on Conan, The Late Show, and has a Comedy Central half-hour special. A regular at the Comedy Cellar, he's known for his animated, physical comedy style.
bio_stand: Hello, my name is Sean Patton. I'm a comedian based in Los Angeles and New York, by way of New Orleans. I began doing stand-up in the Crescent City and have since performed in comedy clubs across the US and Canada. I've also performed at The Melbourne International Comedy Festival (2011), Just for Laughs Chicago (2013), Just for Laughs Toronto (2013), and Just for Laughs Montreal (2008, 2010, 2012). I've performed on Comedy Central's "Live at Gotham" (2009), "Late Night with Jimmy Fallon" (2010), and "Conan" (2011, 2013). 2013 also marked the release of my Comedy Central Half Hour. More recently, I've been on "@midnight" (2014, 2015) and will be on the second seasons of "The Meltdown with Jonah and Kumail"(2015) and "This Is Not Happening" (2015). As for acting, I've appeared on IFC'S "Maron" and Comedy Central's "Inside Amy Schumer." Those are the things I've done that I'm proud of. For a list of things I've done that I'm not so proud of... yeah right, you ain't never gonna know that! I love what I do, some of you will too (thanks!), and some of you will not (but thanks for coming). I want to share myself with you, whomever you are.
tagline_cellar: FROM "LATE NIGHT WITH JIMMY FALLON", ONE HOUR SPECIAL ON PEACOCK

name: Shalewa Sharpe
bio: Shalewa Sharpe is a stand-up comedian and writer based in New York City. She's appeared on The Late Show, Comedy Central, and performs at clubs across NYC.
bio_stand: Shalewa Sharpe tells jokes. She developed her sly yet goofy style in Atlanta, where she was raised. Currently in Brooklyn, New York, she coproduces and hosts a number of shows, including “Thug Passion Presents,” a lively table read and celebration of classic black movies. In May 2016, her debut album, “Stay Eating Cookies,” was released on Rotknee Presents Records; it can be found on iTunes, Amazon, Spotify, and the rest of ‘em. She tells jokes on Twitter (@silkyjumbo) and posts self portraits of varying success on Instagram (@silkyjumbo).

name: Shane Torres
bio: Shane Torres is a stand-up comedian. He went viral for his bit defending Guy Fieri. He performs at clubs across the country.
tagline_cellar: FROM CONAN O'BRIEN SHOW, COMEDY CENTRAL
bio_stand: Shane Torres is a stand up comedian, writer, actor, and podcaster. Originally from Fort Worth, Texas, Shane landed in Portland, Oregon and began his comedy career. Shane has performed on festivals all over the globe including Montreal’s Just For Laughs, Comedy Central’s Clusterfest, San Francisco Sketchfest, Bonnaroo, Outsidelands, Bumbershoot, Moontower Comedy Festival in Austin, Red Clay Comedy Festival, High Plains in Denver, Laughingskull, New York Comedy Festival, Laughfest, and many more. His television appearances to date have included Conan twice, Comedy Central Half Hour Special, IFC’S Comedy Bang Bang, NBC’S Last Comic Standing (barely), Tru Tv’s Comedy Knockout, NBC’s Red Nose Day, and Ron White’s Comedy Salute To The Troops on CMT. He has been heard on such popular podcasts such as Savage Love, All Fantasy Everything, Comedy Bang Bang, Doug Loves Movies and Bertcast. He tours frequently across the states and can often be found performing in a comedy club, theaters, and music venues near you. In March of 2019 his Comedy Central web series Shane Torres Conquers Fear is being released. He has been reviewed by numerous media outlets including The New York Times, Onion AV Club, GQ UK, and more. His album Established 1981 came out in September of 2017 on Comedy Central records “Mr. Torres has a laconic drawling delivery with deliberate pacing, placing him firmly in the tradition of dry deadpan specialist like Tig Notaro and Todd Barry. But his style is warmer, relying on punchlines with corkscrew turns that have moments of vulnerability and even melancholy.” — The New York Times. He lives in Brooklyn, New York.

name: Shannon Fiedler
bio_stand: I’m a writer, director, and stand-up comedian, but you already know that. I used to be a competitive figure skater, I’ve been to Disney World more times than I should probably admit to, and I’m an absolute trivia fiend. I often get caught dancing at my desk, but hey, if you’re not having fun, what’s the point? Oh and…yeah, you should use the Oxford Comma.
bio: Shannon Fiedler is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. She performs at clubs across the city.

name: Shari Diaz
bio_stand: Bronx, NY native, Shari Diaz, switched up her stomping grounds for Raleigh, NC in 2014 where she started standup comedy at Goodnights Comedy Club and Raleigh Improv. Her crossover appeal and crowd working skills had quickly built a platform and a diverse following ranging from hipsters to moms screaming for a night out. With all the positive feedback, she founded a comedy production as an avenue for local comedians to collaborate and bring forth gut wrenching shows. Shari Díaz is also a Co-Producer for the first official Raleigh comedy festival called, Oak City Comedy Festival. In 2019, she moved back to NYC to pursue comedy where she has been booked consistently on some of the hottest comedy shows in the NYC and produces comedy shows all over the city. Shari is also the co-host of Tres Betches Podcast, alongside co-hosts Trina Alper and Jessica Clayton. Her accolades include opening for Joey Medina, Gina Brillon, Pauly Shore, Michael Yo, Carlos Mencia, Godfrey, Mark Viera, The Lucas Bros, Shawn Wayans and Maria Bamford. Shari has been performing at comedy festivals around the country, such as, North Carolina’s Comedy Festival 2018 & 2019 in Greensboro, NC, Big Pine Comedy Festival 2018 in Flagstaff, AZ where she won “Best of Fest”, BTF Comedy Festival in Philly 2019 and Dallas Comedy Festival 2019, and DC’s Comedy Festival 2019, and New York Comedy Festival 2019. You can catch her first comedy special on HBO Max’s “Entre Nos Episode 11: What She Said!”.
bio: Shari Diaz is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. She performs at clubs across the city.

name: Shaun Anthoney
bio: Shaun Anthoney is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Stacy Cay
bio_stand: Stacy Cay is a Kansas City comic with a unique voice you won’t want to miss. Stacy is a trans woman comedian and model raised in rural Arkansas. She’s performed at the New York Comedy Festival, has opened for Josh Gondelman and Niles Abston, and produces the live, slumber party themed standup comedy sensation: Spend the Night. Audiences describe her as “hilarious”, her senators say she’s "disgraceful”, and Tucker Carlson calls her "satanic.”

name: Stef Dag
bio_stand: Hi! I'm a NY-based comedian, writer, and actor who's too self conscious to write in third person. I'm allegedly a rising stand up comedian (their words not mine!!), and a 2022 New York Comedy Festival "Creator to Watch." You may have seen me complaining out loud at The Stand, SF Sketch Fest, Union Hall, The Bell House, or at New York Comedy Festival. Still not convinced? I host the popular digital dating show, Hot and Single, in which I flirt with eligible singles in an effort to find out if they are the problem. I also have a viral TikTok show where I interview men about female anatomy (spoiler alert: it's bleak) and write a monthly newsletter This Sucks, which has an accompanying live show! You should come and bring your crush. Against all odds, people have *willingly* employed me. I'm currently the Senior Editor at Overheard NY and I've directed digital videos for Vogue, Glamour, and Vanity Fair, where I've written digital sketches for Bill Hader, Michael Che & Colin Jost, Rebel Wilson, and more. I wrote the popular Vogue series Everything You Need to Know, which won a Vimeo Staff Pick.

name: Steve Trevino
bio: Steve Trevino is a stand-up comedian known as "America's Favorite Husband." His Netflix specials and clean comedy about marriage and family have made him a major touring headliner.

name: Subhah Agarwal
bio_stand: Subhah's parents immigrated from India to small town America so their children could live the American dream. And by American dream I mean pursue stand up comedy and become an Indian parent's nightmare. She has since become a headlining comedian who has appeared on Comedy Central, Tru Tv, and MTV. She is currently writing on The Jim Jefferies Show for Comedy Central.

name: Sureni Weerasekera
bio_stand: Sureni Weerasekera is a Sri Lankan-born, San Diego-raised, & Oakland-based stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. She is known for her lighthearted, conversational banter to her ruthless, dark jabs that shed light on cultural dilemmas in a palatable, enticing way.

name: Sydnee Washington
bio: Sydnee Washington is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. She co-hosts the Hobby Hunter podcast and is a regular at NYC comedy clubs including the Comedy Cellar. She's appeared on Comedy Central and at major festivals.
tagline_cellar: LATE NIGHT WITH SETH MYERS
bio_stand: Sydnee Washington is a comedian, actor, and writer. In 2022, Sydnee became an Emmy Nominee for her supporting role as Judith in BRIDESMAN. Received a WGA Award for her writing contributions to INSIDE AMY SCHUMER. She was a 2021 Just For Laugh’s New Face for her stand-up work. Has toured with comedians Chelsea Handler, Matteo Lane, Janelle James, and others; as well as her own sold-out, powerful comedic hour, “How To Start A Fire” which blends memoir, storytelling and standup into an unforgettable experiences during her childhood. A podcast staple, she’s been the host of “The Unofficial Expert” with Marie Faustin and Headgum’s “Hobby Hunter”— and as a guest on many popular formats. On social media, she has hosted SYD CAN COOK, for Instagram Live, a first-of-it’s-kind comedy cooking show with celebrity guests. Sydnee’s work has been profiled in W MAGAZINE, VULTURE, VANITY FAIR, and THE NEW YORK TIMES.

name: T.J. Miller
bio: T.J. Miller is a stand-up comedian and actor. He's best known for playing Erlich Bachman on HBO's Silicon Valley and voicing the lead in The Emoji Movie. He starred in Deadpool and Deadpool 2 and has released HBO and Comedy Central specials.

name: TaTa Sherise
bio_stand: TaTa Sherise is a dynamic NY based comedian , actress, and creator making waves in the comedy scene. She’s been hailed as “The Next Hottest Comedian to Come Out of Philly” by The Philadelphia Inquirer. In 2024, she made history as the first Black woman to win Philly’s Phunniest. TaTa was named a 2023 & 2024 NY Comedy Fest Creator and Comic to Watch. She produces sketches, funny themed comedy shows, and short films. Catch her bringing the giggles and indulging in pure silliness while talking about life with her creative partner “Drizz” on their “Girls Got Giggles” podcast. Known for her high-energy performances, raw humor, and captivating stage presence, she brings real-life stories and unfiltered honesty to the stage. You can find TaTa in films on Tubi and Amazon Prime. TaTa’s comedy connects with audiences through her unique blend of charm, wit, trauma, and movement on stage. She’s most definitely one to keep up with!

name: Tammy Pescatelli
bio: Tammy Pescatelli is a stand-up comedian, actress, and author. She's appeared on multiple late night shows, was a finalist on Last Comic Standing, and tours as a headliner. Known for her material about being a working mom.
bio_stand: Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central

name: Taylor Tomlinson
bio: Taylor Tomlinson is a stand-up comedian who became the host of CBS's After Midnight. Her Netflix specials Quarter-Life Crisis, Look at You, and Have It All were critically acclaimed. She started comedy at age 16 and quickly became one of the most popular young comedians in the country.
bio_stand: Taylor Tomlinson started doing stand up comedy at just sixteen years old, when she realized that her quiet, sarcastic asides were not being adequately appreciated by her peers. Her self-deprecating charm and conversational wit have made her a favorite at comedy clubs, colleges, corporate events, and other suspicious, rented spaces across the country. She was featured in her own regular segment ("Young as Hell") on Laughs on FOX season 1 and can now be seen hosting the show every week. She was a top ten finalist on season 9 of NBC's Last Comic Standing and can be seen on the upcoming season of Adam Devine's House Party on Comedy Central.

name: Theo Von
bio: Theo Von is a stand-up comedian and podcast host from Covington, Louisiana. His podcast This Past Weekend is one of the most popular comedy podcasts. He's released Netflix specials Regular People and appeared on numerous podcasts. Known for his Southern storytelling style and unique observations.
bio_stand: Theo Von grew up in the stray animal belt of southern Louisiana. He was a child there and became an adult there, slowly. He can be seen and heard weekly on his podcast THIS PAST WEEKEND, where he talks with guests, himself, and with his listeners who he truly loves. He has comedy specials on Netflix, but so do a lot of people. Theo is currently selling out venues for his Return of the Rat Tour. He feels grateful and overwhelmed at the same time. If you want to know how Theo is doing he is probably doing the best he can; which varies He currently resides in Nashville and Los Angeles. He wrote this. Gang.

name: Tim Butterly
bio_stand: Tim Butterly is a fat bearded comedian from Philadelphia. In addition to co hosting Dad Meat Podcast, he performs stand up and has acted in numerous commercials, television shows and films, with his defining role coming as a cheese pervert in the film Zeroes. He recently grew a mustache and got jacked, so prepare to be wet.
bio: Tim Butterly is a stand-up comedian based in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city and has appeared on multiple podcasts.

name: Tim Dillon
bio: Tim Dillon is a stand-up comedian, podcaster, and actor. The Tim Dillon Show is one of the top comedy podcasts. He's appeared on Joe Rogan multiple times and released a Netflix special. Known for his bombastic rants and satirical takes on American culture and politics.
bio_stand: Tim Dillon is American stand-up comedian, writer and actor. Known for his no-holds-barred humor and incisive social commentary, Dillon’s comedy has captured audiences around the globe. His podcast, “The Tim Dillon Show,” averages a million viewers a week between video and audio downloads. He tours theaters internationally and has a Netflix Special, “Tim Dillon: A Real Hero.” Tim has been a guest on the Joe Rogan Experience 13 times. As an actor, Tim has appeared in the movie Thanksgiving (2023) and is set to be in more major projects in 2024. His Book ”Death by Boomers: How the Worst Generation Destroyed the Planet, but First a Child” will be published later in 2024.

name: Tom Cassidy
bio_stand: Tom Cassidy is a comedian who started in Philadelphia at The Laff House Comedy Club (urban clubs spell things wrong due to the deterioration of the public school system) where he became a feature act 2 weeks before the club shut down. After spending a few years in his native land, which has produced many great comedians (Kevin Hart, Tina Fey and up until recently Bill Cosby) he moved to New York City where he performs regularly at clubs, basements and back of bars that vary in quality. He has been featured at The New York, Boston, Staten Island and Hoboken Comedy Festival (placed in the order of respect each festival gets) and has performed at colleges throughout the east coast in beautiful theaters and fluorescent cafeteria's. In addition to performing literally wherever will have him Tom is also a writer who has directed several sketches and short films, including "Babe Ruth Time Traveler" and it's sequel (you can guess what it's called). Tom is also a co-host on the Center City Comedy podcast where he can be found arguing and making fun of his friends on a weekly basis.
bio: Tom Cassidy is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Tom Green
bio: Tom Green is a stand-up comedian, actor, and talk show host. He starred in The Tom Green Show on MTV and films like Road Trip and Freddy Got Fingered. He hosts a podcast and performs stand-up worldwide.
bio_stand: Tom Green sparked a TV revolution with his hit MTV comedy series "The Tom Green Show." One of MTV’s top-rated programs, "The Tom Green Show" paved the way for shows like "Jackass," "Punk’d" and "Fear Factor. With its guerrilla video tactics and outrageous stunts, it was unlike anything that had been seen before. "The Tom Green Show" began on public access TV and was picked up by MTV. In a sense, it was the original independent, viral-video hit, years before YouTube even existed. The raw home-video look was what made the show relatable to young audiences across the globe, and its hilarious clips are still hugely popular online. After his show was acquired and broadcast by MTV, Tom went on to produce, direct and star in several films. He appeared in such blockbusters as "Road Trip" and "Charlie’s Angels," as well as the cult classics "Freddy Got Fingered," "Stealing Harvard," and "Bob the Butler." He has appeared multiple times on "The Late Show with David Letterman," "The Tonight Show," "Oprah," "The Jimmy Kimmel Show," "The View," "Late Night with Conan O'Brien," "Live with Regis & Kelly," and "The Wendy Williams Show." In fact, he is one of the few comedians in history given the chance to guest-host David Letterman’s program. He has also hosted 'Saturday Night Live," and has appeared on numerous magazine covers including the coveted cover of Rolling Stone magazine. His autobiography "Hollywood Causes Cancer" is a critically-acclaimed book detailing his battle with Testicular Cancer which he beat successfully at the peak of his MTV show's meteoric rise. "The Cancer Special," a full-length television special for MTV, documented Tom's multiple surgeries and was called one of the Top Ten TV shows of the year by Time magazine. Tom’s independent online talk show "Tom Green’s House Tonight" was the first LIVE streaming talk show to become a massive success on the Internet. Audiences worldwide have enjoyed this ground-breaking series broadcast in real time from Tom's home-made living-room studio living room. It is the highest-rated online talk show in history and has attracted A-list celebrities and comedians to appear as Tom's guests. Tom is currently traveling the world on a sold-out stand-up comedy tour, and has just completed his first 90-minute stand-up comedy special for Showtime to be broadcast and released on video this year. He is also planning to launch a 24-hour live Internet comedy channel which will be the first of its kind. Given Tom Green’s background of making independent TV accessible to large mainstream audiences, it is sure to be a massive success. Stay tuned. Tom has started a weekly podcast entitled "Tom Green Radio", recently released "The Tom Green Beer" (with Beau's) in Canada, and is an article contributor to the Huffington Post. In October 2013, Tom started his live talk-show "Tom Green Live" on AXS TV.

name: Tom McGuire
bio_stand: Starting his comedy career in 2019 after a failed attempt at being a college basketball player, Tom had a short stint in stand up before the Covid-19 Pandemic shut the world down. Returning back to the stage in May of 2021, Tom has made a name for himself as a rising stand up comedian, and was the winner of the 2021 “Long Island Laugh Off.” Present day, Tom can be seen performing regularly all throughout New York City and Long Island. Tom graduated from Sacred Heart University with a Bachelors Degree in Finance. He hopes that he never has to use it since he retained zero of the knowledge he learned, and is shocked he even has a degree in the field. Follow Tom @tommcguirecomedy on all social media platforms.

name: Tom Rhodes
bio: Tom Rhodes is a stand-up comedian and world traveler. He's performed in over 40 countries and hosted NBC's Friday Night. Known for his worldly perspective and long hair, he's been a professional comic since age 15.
bio_stand: When you strip away the fluff of pop, throw out the country flair, remove the cynicism of alternative, and turn up the beauty of americana, you begin to have an idea of where Tom's music falls. Tom Rhodes plays real, honest music that dives down to the heart of the matter and holds you there until you realize it's where we all belong. With his latest release, "With or Without" (2014), Tom has moved his music further back on the dial and created a warm place for his raspy road worn voice and deceptively simple guitar. Since his first self titled solo release in 2004, Tom has put out three more albums – each with a sound of its own. "No Apologies" (2006) moves from rock to reggae to country within 15 songs. "Better Son" (2011) planted footing in the Alt-Country/Folk scene, gaining nods as one of the top 20 albums of 2011 (AMDWHH) and Top 5 Country albums (Nerve.com). With his latest release, there is another turn: bringing in big vocal harmonies and an amazing backing band. Originally from Houston, Texas, Tom grew up mostly in the DC area playing in bars and clubs at 16. He moved to New York City in late 2003 where he came into his own as a solo artist and songwriter, releasing two albums there. In 2006, he moved to Wilmington, NC where he worked on writing and getting his songs published on Network TV, Cable, and independent movies. In 2011, he and his wife and dog Barkley sold almost everything that they owned and packed up to move out to San Francisco, CA where they now reside. Tom continues to play shows all over the United States and Europe with his new band, looking for new audiences to help spread his music and loves making new friends along the way. With hundreds of unreleased songs, and thousands of stories still waiting to be told, there will be years of content to come from this life-long troubadour.

name: Tom Shillue
bio: Tom Shillue is a stand-up comedian, author, and TV host. He hosted The Greg Gutfeld Show on Fox News and has performed at clubs and theaters nationwide. Known for his nostalgic storytelling about growing up in Massachusetts.
bio_stand: Tom Shillue currently serves as a FOX News contributor, joining the network in 2015. He regularly serves as a panelist on FNC’s late night program Gutfeld! (weeknights, 11PM/ET). Prior to that, he served as the host of Red Eye. As the host of Red Eye (weekdays from 3-4AM/ET), Shillue was joined by a roundtable of panelists to debate and debunk on the top stories of the day. Shillue is a stand-up comedian who was previously a correspondent on Comedy Central's The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. He has also appeared on NBC's The Tonight Show and received awards from the ECNY for "Best Storyteller" in 2011 and "Best One Person Show" in 2010.

name: Tommy Mitchell
bio: Tommy Mitchell is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Tony Hinchcliffe
bio: Tony Hinchcliffe is a stand-up comedian, writer, and podcast host. He hosts the hugely popular Kill Tony podcast, a live comedy show where audience members perform. He's written for Comedy Central Roasts and tours as a headliner.
bio_stand: Originally from Youngstown, Ohio, Tony Hinchcliffe is one of the top young rising comedians, touring internationally, as well as a lively career as an actor, podcaster, and writer. Tony’s first one hour special “One Shot” premiered on Netflix in 2016, and he has appeared on shows including HBO’s “Crashing”, Fusion’s “All Def Roast: Snoop Dog Smokeout” and Comedy Central’s “Unsend” and “@Midnight”. In addition to “Kill Tony”, Hinchcliffe has his podcasts “The Store Horsemen” and “The Pony Hour” and regularly appears on “The Joe Rogan Experience”.

name: Tony Woods
bio: Tony Woods is a veteran stand-up comedian known as a 'comedian's comedian.' He's been performing for decades and is respected by top comedians for his unique, meandering comedy style.
tagline_cellar: FROM "THE LETTERMAN SHOW".
bio_stand: Tony Woods is a one-of-a-kind comedic legend that is always in control of his audience. A seasoned veteran in the comedy business, Tony is recognized not only by fans but by his peers as one of the best and most engaging comedians in the business. Tony has a strong following in the US, UK, Australia and Europe. Born in North Carolina and raised in the D.C. area, Woods kicked off his career as an original member of Russell Simmons' Def Comedy Jam on HBO and P. Diddy's Bad Boys of Comedy, he is an all-round veteran and one-of-a-kind comic. His playful and cool demeanour, combined with sharp and mischievous subject matter, create a show that is unmistakably entertaining at every level. A natural entertainer, Woods understands an audience and encourages them to become part of his strange world. Tony’s recent appearances Comedy Central Presents Tony Woods, Comedy Central USO Tour, and Comedy Central World Comedy Tour have made him a comic favorite of international renown. He has also appeared on Last Comic Standing, A&E’s Caroline’s Comedy Hour, Showtime at the Apollo, NBC’s Friday Night Videos, Just for Laughs, NYPD Blue, HACK, Late Night with Conan O'Brien, HBO Comedy Spot and Asutralia's - The Footy Show. Woods has also appeared in the film The Brooklyn Project, and his festival appearances include triumphs at the Just For Laughs Comedy Festival in Montreal, the HBO U.S. Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen, Colorado, the Melbourne Comedy Festival and is a favourite at the Sydney Comedy Festival.

name: Tristan Bowling
bio_stand: Tristan Bowling is a 25 year old comedian hailing from Phoenix Arizona. Starting at 16 years old, Tristan has worked rigorously in the local scene to climb the Phoenix comedy ladder and has gotten the opportunity to preform across the country. Recently he has gotten recognition from the number one live podcast in the world “Kill Tony” hosted by Tony Hinchcliffe and Brian Redban. There he received a ‘golden ticket’ to preform on the show anytime he wants and since then he’s preformed with them regularly at the world famous Comedy Store, making a name for himself in Los Angeles and across the nation.

name: Vladimir Caamano
bio_stand: With the name “Vladimir,” few people expect a Dominican from The Bronx to take the stage. His comedic style is the fruit of an immigrant Dominican family living in the cultural mecca that is New York City and is described as an elegant combination of urban grit and intellect. He began polishing his wit in the concrete jungles of The Bronx and Washington Heights and after graduating from Wesleyan University launched into Standup Comedy. After his stand out performance at Just for Laughs (JFL) in 2015, Vlad entered into a put pilot development deal to co-write, and star in a pilot based off of his comedy for NBC with Bill Lawrence and WB supervising. Vlad co-wrote the script with UNDATEABLE writer, Adam Styzikiel and recently shot the pilot directed by Phill Lewis. Vlad was the only one of his New Faces class to be chosen to perform as part of the CW Gala hosted by Howie Mandel. In 2016, Vlad was named one of the Top 10 Comics to Watch by Variety and was honored at JFL. In 2017 Vlad made his late-night standup debut on Jimmy Kimmel Live! and performed again at the prestigious Just for Laughs Gala hosted by Lilly Singh. Vlad has been seen on Brooklyn Nine-Nine, Marvel’s Runaways, and NBC’s Superstore. He is currently developing television shows with top comedy producers and networks.
bio: Vladimir Caamano is a stand-up comedian based in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Wilfred Padua
bio_stand: Wilfred Padua is a comedian in New York who has an MFA in Writing from some place in Chicago. He has performed at Bumbershoot, Bridgetown Comedy Festival, 10,000 Laughs, and was a finalist in the Big Sky Comedy Festival. He has been featured on NPR and Sirius XM, and was named one of the 50 Best Undiscovered Comedians in America by Thrillist where they said his comedy was “impish” for some reason.
bio: Wilfred Padua is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Wyatt Cenac
bio: Wyatt Cenac is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He was a correspondent on The Daily Show and created Problem Areas on HBO. He's released Netflix specials and performs at clubs in NYC.

name: Yannis Pappas
bio: Yannis Pappas is a stand-up comedian and podcaster. He hosts the Long Days podcast and has created viral characters like Mr. Panos on YouTube. He performs at clubs and theaters across the country.
bio_stand: Yannis Pappas is a stand-up comedian and current host of AOL's Original Series, 2 Point Lead. He was the Co-Anchor of Fusion Live, a live, primetime, one-hour news magazine program which focused on current events, pop culture and satire. Fusion TV network launched in September 2013 as a joint venture of ABC and Univision. Yannis' Half Hour Comedy Central Special aired in June of 2014 and is available on Amazon, iTunes, ComedyCentral.com and whenever Comedy Central re-runs it. Yannis was also the co-host of MSG's sports fan show, The Bracket. He has also been featured on AXS TV, TRUTV's How To Be a Grown Up, VH1's "Best Week Ever", Fox Business, Good Morning America on ABC. He was the first comedian to ever do stand up on the New Tonight Show with Jimmy Fallon–It was a test show and didn't air, but that's kind of a cool thing. He tours the world as a stand-up comedian and is known for his immensely popular characters Mr. Panos and Maurica.

name: Zach Brazao
bio_stand: While his accent gives him away as a Boston comic, Zach Brazão has entertained audiences all over the country. He has performed in the Southland Comedy Festival, was a finalist in the Boston Comedy Festival, and was named Best of the Fest at Minneapolis’s 10,000 Laughs Festival. Sporting a baby face and a grandfather’s vernacular, Zach has charmed diverse audiences in multifarious settings ranging from comedy clubs to nursing homes and even an Arena Football halftime show. Much of Zach’s humor centers around the idiosyncrasies of suburban life, parents who loved him too much, and the banality of office life. He is currently reading the Personal Memoirs of Ulysses S. Grant and resides in New York City.
bio: Zach Brazao is a stand-up comedian performing in New York City. He performs at clubs across the city.

name: Aaron Chen
bio_stand: Born and raised in Sydney, Australia, Aaron has quickly climbed the ranks of the international comedy scene. Aaron made his mark on Australian comedy with his debut solo show in 2017 and since then has toured nationally in front of sold-out crowds and rave reviews, earning him the sought-after awards for Best Newcomer (2017) and Director’s Choice (2019), and nomination for Best Show (2021) at the Melbourne International Comedy Festival. Since his critically acclaimed performance at the 2019 Edinburgh Fringe Festival, Aaron supported comedian Ronny Chieng on his Live Australian Tour, and had feature roles in Ronny Chieng International Student (ABC), Orange is the New Brown (Seven Network), and FISK (Netflix). As a comedian, he also appears on Australia’s #1 panel show, Have You Been Paying Attention (Network 10). Aaron’s acclaimed 2021 Adult Swim special A Life in Questions was for nominated for Best Short Form Comedy special at the Australian Academy of Cinema and Television Arts Awards, and lead to development deals with Adult Swim/Warner Media. His stand-up special, If It Weren’t Filmed, Nobody Would Believe was released on YouTube in September 2022 and has accumulated almost 1 million views.
tagline_cellar: FROM LATE NIGHT WITH SETH MEYERS, 'fisk",

name: Adam Gilbert
tagline_cellar: JUST FOR LAUGHS, DONT TELL COMEDY

name: Alex Kumin
tagline_cellar: Comedy Central, Timeout NY Comic to Watch, NBC
bio_stand: Alex Kumin's bold and whip smart standup delights crowds across the city of Chicago and around the US. She is an alumni of the nation's longest running independent standup comedy showcase, The Lincoln Lodge, through which she also teaches Chicago's favorite all-female standup class, Feminine Comique. Her monthly showcase, Diamond Comedy Hour, takes place at the Chicago Laugh Factory on the first Friday of the month, featuring the premiere female comedians in the city and beyond. She has had the pleasure of working with Patton Oswalt, Maria Bamford, Tom Green, Rory Scovel, The Lucas Brothers, Aparna Nancherla, Greg Fitzsimmons, Jen Kirkman, and Todd Barry, among others and was selected as one of eight comedians at Gilda's Laughfest - Best of the Midwest Competition 2017. She made her television debut on WCIU's "Chicago's One Night Standup" and has appeared in NBC Universal's Breakout Festival ('16, '17, ‘18), Limestone Comedy Festival, Orlando Indie Comedy Fest and The Chicago Comedy Exposition. In 2016 she was named a comic to watch by Timeout Chicago and was one of Chicago Reader's standout comedians of the year. She has been featured in Chicago Magazine as a comedian with "unapologetic honesty", as she tackles heavy hitting social issues like gender inequality and thigh chaffing.

name: Andrew Fiori
tagline_cellar: FROM COMEDY CENTRAL, HOST OF THE RAW REPORT ON SIRIUSXM

name: Andy Haynes
bio: Andy Haynes is a stand-up comedian. He has appeared on The Late Show, Conan, and Comedy Central. He performs at clubs across the country.
tagline_cellar: LATE NIGHT WITH JIMMY FALLON, CONAN, COMEDY CENTRAL PRESENTS, ROAST BATTLE

name: Are You Garbage
bio: Are You Garbage is a comedy podcast and live show hosted by H. Foley and Kevin Ryan. The show explores whether guests grew up 'classy' or 'garbage.' They perform live shows at the Comedy Cellar and other venues.

name: Brendan Sagalow
tagline_cellar: JFL new faces 2022

name: Colin Quinn
bio: Colin Quinn is a legendary stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He was the Weekend Update anchor on SNL and starred in Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn on Comedy Central. He's written and performed multiple one-man Broadway shows including Long Story Short and New York Story. A Comedy Cellar institution.
tagline_cellar: FROM THE MOVIE "TRAINWRECK", STAR OF ONE MAN SHOWS:"RED STATE BLUE STATE", "UNCONSTITUTIONAL", "LONG STORY SHORT" ON BROADWAY AND HBO, STAR OF COMEDY CENTRAL'S "TOUGH CROWD", SATURDAY NIGHT LIVE, NBC'S "THE COLIN QUINN SHOW'.

name: Greer Barnes
bio: Greer Barnes is a stand-up comedian and regular at the Comedy Cellar. He's appeared on multiple late night shows and Comedy Central. A veteran of the NYC comedy scene known for his energetic performances.
tagline_cellar: FROM HBO'S "CRASHING",  THE "DAVE CHAPPELLE SHOW", "TOUGH CROWD", "FOR LOVE OF THE GAME", AND "THE DAVID LETTERMAN SHOW".

name: Gregg Rogell

bio_wiki: Gregg Rogell is an American professional comedian. Born on Long Island, Rogell resides in New York City and is a regular performer at the Comedy Cellar and the Comic Strip Live. He has appeared on The Tonight Show, Late Night with Conan O'Brien, Louie, Half Baked, and The Nanny. He has had his own h

name: Hot Soup
bio: Hot Soup is a weekly stand-up comedy show at the Comedy Cellar's Fat Black Pussycat room on Tuesday nights. Produced by Mark Normand and featuring top NYC comedians.
tagline_cellar: Hot Soup, the long-running Tuesday night comedy show, has a new home at the FBPC. This show is curated by Mark Normand, Gary Vider and Matt Ruby.

name: Janelle James
bio: Janelle James is a stand-up comedian and actress. She stars as Ava Coleman on the hit ABC series Abbott Elementary. She's appeared on The Tonight Show and multiple comedy specials. A Comedy Cellar regular who's become a major TV star.

name: Jon Laster
tagline_cellar: WINNER OF STAND UP NBC,

name: Josh Ocean Thomas
tagline_cellar: "NETFLIX IS A JOKE", 2025 COMICS TO WATCH, DON'T TELL COMEDY
bio_stand: Josh Ocean Thomas is a Tunisian-American stand-up comedian based in Chicago. J.O.T. is headed to NYC to bring his energetic stage presence, quick wit, and larger-than-life physicality to the stage, along with some of his favorite comedians. From stories about his family and past relationships to sharp observations on his mixed cultural background, Josh delivers vibrant, relatable humor that connects with audiences everywhere. Standing six feet tall (well, 5’11”), and weighing in at 160 pounds, Josh was named one of the “2025 Comics to Watch” by the New York City Comedy Festival. He’s performed at top comedy clubs and has toured theaters nationwide alongside comedians like Tim Dillon, Morgan Jay, and more

name: Kc Shornima
tagline_cellar: WEEKEND UPDATE WRITER AT SATURDAY NIGHT LIVE, JUST FOR LAUGHS NEW FACES

name: Keith Alberstadt
bio: Keith Alberstadt is a stand-up comedian and writer. He has written for The Tonight Show and performs at clubs across the country.

name: LeClerc Andre
tagline_cellar: THE TONIGHT SHOW,

name: Liza Treyger
bio: Liza Treyger is a stand-up comedian and writer. She's appeared on Conan, @midnight, and has a Comedy Central half-hour special. She's a regular at the Comedy Cellar and known for her uninhibited comedy about relationships and nightlife.
tagline_cellar: FROM NETFLIX: THE DEGENERATES, LATE NIGHT WITH SETH MEYERS, THE CHELSEA LATELY SHOW, COMEDY CENTRAL
bio_stand: Liza Treyger is a New York based stand up comic by way of Chicago and raised in Skokie!!!! She has her own comedy Central half hour and album, Glittercheese. She's appeared on Late Night with Seth Meyers, Chelsea Lately, @Midnight, This is Not Happening, Not Safe with Nikki Glaser, Horace & Pete, Adam Devine's House Party, and Lie Detectors. She likes late 90s/early 2000's pop and soul music. She enjoys collaging, shopping, walking around NYC, private pools, chatting with friends and fighting with enemies, but mostly spending money, telling jokes, and giggling with girlfriends.

name: Ryan Hamilton
bio: Ryan Hamilton is a stand-up comedian known for his clean, observational humor. His Netflix special Happy Face was a hit. He's appeared on The Tonight Show and Late Night and performs at clubs including the Comedy Cellar.

name: Tommy Brennan
tagline_cellar: NEWEST CAST MEMBER SATURDAY NIGHT LIVE,  JUST FOR LAUGHS NEW FACES
bio_wiki: Thomas Brennan Schneeman, known professionally as Tommy Brennan, is an American stand-up comedian from St. Paul, Minnesota and a cast member of Saturday Night Live for season 51.
bio_stand: Recently selected as a "New Face" at the world-renowned Just For Laughs Comedy Festival, Tommy Brennan is one of the fastest rising stars in comedy today. Originally a Chicago comic, Tommy is now based out of Los Angeles, while touring the country playing prestigious clubs like Zanies, Comedy on State, Caroline's on Broadway, and more. He regularly opens for both Kelsey Cook and Becky Robinson, and was lucky enough to work with the late, great Louie Anderson as well. Along with his standup, you may know Tommy from the popular web series and podcast Roommates-In-Law, which he created with fellow comic Tim Smith. The series has gained a cult following online and amassed over 1 million views. Tommy’s never-grow-up demeanor and midwestern nature will have you re-telling his jokes at the dinner table while thinking “Was he really funny or did I just see a potential son in him?"

name: Wil Sylvince
bio: Wil Sylvince is a stand-up comedian based in New York City. He's a regular at the Comedy Cellar and has appeared on Comedy Central and multiple late night shows. Of Haitian descent, he's known for his high-energy, animated performances.
tagline_cellar: SHOWTIME, HBO, SHORT CUTS FILM FESTIVAL

name: Lil Sasquatch
bio: Lil Sasquatch is a stand-up comedian and content creator. Known for his comedy about millennial and Gen Z culture.
bio_stand: Harry, also more commonly known as Lil Sasquatch, works at Barstool Sports and his funny videos have accumulated thousands of views across all social media platforms. He is the co-host of the Son Of A Boy Dad Pocast.

name: Amos Gil
bio: Amos Gill is one of Australia's hottest comedians, now performing internationally across the USA, UK, and Australia. Known for his sharp humor and quick wit.
bio_stand: Amos Gill is one of Australia’s hottest comedians, now making waves internationally as a touring headliner across the USA, UK, and Australia. Known for his sharp humor and quick wit, Amos first gained attention as a beloved Adelaide radio host on Amos, Cat & Angus. After leaving radio in 2018, he quickly became a comic to watch, earning accolades such as runner-up in triple j’s RAW Comedy competition and hosting the Melbourne International Comedy Festival’s prestigious Comedy Zone. Amos has performed at iconic venues like the Sydney Opera House and Madison Square Garden, touring internationally with Jim Jefferies. He’s appeared on TV shows like The Full Brazilian and Comedy Up Late and recently sold out his 2022 solo tour, You’ve Wrecked The Joint. Amos now co-hosts At This Moment, a hit new podcast with Jim Jefferies, further showcasing his comedic talents to a global audience.

name: Dave Chappelle
bio: Dave Chappelle is one of the greatest stand-up comedians of all time. He created Chappelle's Show on Comedy Central and has released multiple Netflix specials. He won the Mark Twain Prize for American Humor and regularly performs surprise sets at NYC comedy clubs.

name: Chris Rock
bio: Chris Rock is a legendary stand-up comedian, actor, writer, and director. He hosted SNL, starred in multiple films, and his comedy specials are among the most acclaimed ever. He performs occasional surprise sets at the Comedy Cellar.

name: Jerry Seinfeld
bio: Jerry Seinfeld is one of the most successful comedians in history. He co-created and starred in Seinfeld, one of the greatest TV shows ever. He still performs stand-up regularly and released the Netflix special 23 Hours to Kill.

name: Louis C.K.
bio: Louis C.K. is a stand-up comedian, writer, director, and actor. He created and starred in the FX series Louie. His comedy specials are considered among the best ever made. He regularly performs at the Comedy Cellar.

name: Kevin Hart
bio: Kevin Hart is one of the biggest comedians in the world. He's starred in numerous blockbuster films and his comedy tours have broken box office records. His Netflix specials and Laugh Out Loud network have made him a comedy mogul.

name: Sebastian Maniscalco
bio: Sebastian Maniscalco is one of the top-grossing stand-up comedians in the world. His physical comedy and Italian-American observations have sold out arenas. He's starred in multiple Netflix specials and appeared in The Irishman and About My Father.

name: John Mulaney
bio: John Mulaney is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. A former SNL writer, his Netflix specials Kid Gorgeous, New in Town, and Baby J are hugely popular. He performs live regularly and has hosted SNL multiple times.

name: Tom Segura
bio: Tom Segura is a stand-up comedian and podcaster. He co-hosts Your Mom's House podcast with his wife Christina P. He has multiple Netflix specials including Ball Hog and Sledgehammer. He headlines arenas across the country.

name: Joe Rogan
bio: Joe Rogan is a stand-up comedian, podcast host, and UFC commentator. The Joe Rogan Experience is one of the most popular podcasts in the world. He has multiple comedy specials and performs at his own comedy club, Comedy Mothership, in Austin.

name: Ali Wong
bio: Ali Wong is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. Her Netflix specials Baby Cobra and Hard Knock Wife were massive hits. She starred in Always Be My Maybe, Beef (winning an Emmy), and performs live regularly.

name: Trevor Noah
bio: Trevor Noah is a stand-up comedian, writer, and former host of The Daily Show. Born in South Africa, his memoir Born a Crime was a bestseller. He continues to tour globally as one of the biggest comedians in the world.

name: Wanda Sykes
bio: Wanda Sykes is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. She's starred in multiple TV shows, won an Emmy for writing on The Chris Rock Show, and has Netflix specials. One of the most respected voices in comedy.

name: Gabriel Iglesias
bio: Gabriel 'Fluffy' Iglesias is one of the most popular stand-up comedians in the world. Known for his storytelling and sound effects, he sells out arenas and has multiple Netflix specials. He stars in Mr. Iglesias on Netflix.

name: Jim Gaffigan
bio: Jim Gaffigan is a stand-up comedian, actor, and author. Known for his clean comedy about food and parenting, he's released numerous specials and bestselling books. He's performed at the Comedy Cellar and sells out arenas.

name: Russell Peters
bio: Russell Peters is a stand-up comedian known internationally for his comedy about cultural stereotypes and growing up Indian-Canadian. He was one of the first comedians to go viral on YouTube and sells out arenas worldwide.

name: Amy Schumer
bio: Amy Schumer is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. She created and starred in Inside Amy Schumer on Comedy Central, starred in Trainwreck, and has multiple Netflix specials. She regularly performs at the Comedy Cellar.

name: Bo Burnham
bio: Bo Burnham is a stand-up comedian, filmmaker, and musician. His Netflix specials Make Happy and Inside were critically acclaimed. He directed the film Eighth Grade and acts in films like Promising Young Woman.

name: Demetri Martin
bio: Demetri Martin is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. Known for his one-liner comedy and visual aids, he had his own Comedy Central show and has appeared in multiple films. He performs at clubs across the country.

name: Whitney Cummings
bio: Whitney Cummings is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. She co-created 2 Broke Girls, created and starred in Whitney, and has multiple Netflix specials. She performs at clubs and theaters across the country.

name: Dane Cook
bio: Dane Cook is a stand-up comedian and actor who was one of the biggest stand-up acts of the 2000s. He sold out Madison Square Garden and starred in multiple films. He continues to tour and perform at clubs.

name: Iliza Shlesinger
bio: Iliza Shlesinger is a stand-up comedian and actress. She won Last Comic Standing Season 6 and has released multiple Netflix specials including Elder Millennial and Hot Forever. She performs at theaters across the country.

name: Hannibal Buress
bio: Hannibal Buress is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He was a writer on 30 Rock and SNL, starred in Broad City and The Eric Andre Show, and has multiple specials. His comedy about Bill Cosby helped spark renewed scrutiny.

name: Patton Oswalt
bio: Patton Oswalt is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He voices Remy in Ratatouille, starred in King of Queens, and has won Grammy Awards and an Emmy for his comedy specials. One of the most respected comedians working.

name: Pete Holmes
bio: Pete Holmes is a stand-up comedian, actor, and podcast host. He created and starred in Crashing on HBO, hosts the You Made It Weird podcast, and has multiple HBO specials. Known for his exuberant comedy style.

name: Fortune Feimster
bio: Fortune Feimster is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. She appeared on Chelsea Lately, The Mindy Project, and has Netflix specials. Known for her Southern charm and self-deprecating humor.
tagline_cellar: WHAT A JOKE WITH PAPA AND FORTUNE ON SIRIUSXM, FORTUNE FEIMSTER: CRUSHING IT NETFLIX SPECIAL

name: Norm Macdonald
bio: Norm Macdonald was a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He was the Weekend Update anchor on SNL and starred in multiple TV shows. Widely regarded as one of the greatest comedians ever, he passed away in 2021.
bio_wiki: Norman Gene Macdonald was a Canadian stand-up comedian, actor, and writer whose style was characterized by deadpan delivery, eccentric understatement, and the use of folksy, old-fashioned turns of phrase. He appeared in numerous films and was a frequent guest on late-night talk shows, where he developed a reputation for his chaotic yet understated comedic style. His appearances on Conan O'Brien's and David Letterman's programs were especially well-received, with the latter describing him as "the best" stand-up comedian.

name: Mitch Hedberg
bio: Mitch Hedberg was a stand-up comedian known for his surreal, one-liner comedy style and laid-back delivery. His albums Strategic Grill Locations and Mitch All Together are beloved. He passed away in 2005 but remains hugely influential.
bio_wiki: Mitchell Lee Hedberg was an American stand-up comedian and filmmaker known for his surreal humor and deadpan delivery. His comedy typically featured short, sometimes one-line jokes mixed with absurd elements and non sequiturs.

name: Maria Bamford
bio: Maria Bamford is a stand-up comedian and actress. She created and starred in Lady Dynamite on Netflix. Known for her character voices and comedy about mental health, she's one of the most unique voices in comedy.

name: Brendan Schaub
bio: Brendan Schaub is a stand-up comedian, podcaster, and former UFC fighter. He hosts The Fighter and the Kid and Thiccc Boy podcasts. He performs at clubs and theaters across the country.

name: Bobby Lee
bio: Bobby Lee is a stand-up comedian, actor, and podcaster. He was a cast member on MADtv and hosts the TigerBelly podcast. He's appeared in multiple TV shows and films and performs at clubs across the country.

name: Lil Rel Howery
bio: Lil Rel Howery is a stand-up comedian and actor. He starred in Get Out, Bird Box, and Free Guy. He had his own series Rel on Fox and has appeared on multiple comedy specials. A major force in comedy and film.

name: Roy Wood Jr.
bio: Roy Wood Jr. is a stand-up comedian, actor, and correspondent on The Daily Show. He's released comedy specials and performs at clubs across the country. Known for his Southern-tinged observations about race and politics.
bio_stand: Currently a correspondent on ‘The Daily Show w/ Trevor Noah’, Roy has been described by the Hollywood Reporter as “A Standout”, and Entertainment Weekly called his brand of thought provoking comedy as “charismatic crankiness”. In 2016 ‘Variety’ magazine named him one of 10 Comics to watch. Prior to ‘The Daily Show’ Roy spent three years on the TBS‘ sitcom, Sullivan and Son. And is still a regular on He’s currently a regular on ‘Conan’, ESPN’s ‘SportsNation’ & Comedy Central’s @Midnight. A native of Birmingham, Alabama, Roy began his comedy career in 1998 at the age of 19 while attending Florida A&M University. He went on to make his television debut in 2006 on The Late Show with David Letterman. and finished third in the 2010 season of Last Comic Standing. He’s also appeared on HBO’s Def Comedy Jam, Comedy Central’s Premium Blend and The Late, Late Show with Craig Ferguson Prior to this he also appeared at the 2006 Montreal Just for Laughs Comedy Festival in the “New Faces Showcase”. In 2006, Wood appeared on the Bob and Tom Radio Show: The Comedy Tour on Comedy Central. Also a veteran of radio (2001-2012) Roy’s morning show took home awards from the Alabama Broadcasters association for ‘Best Large Market Morning Show’. Wood has recorded three nationally-released prank call CD’s: My Momma Made Me Wear This (2003), Confessions of a High School Bench Warmer (2005) and I’ll Slap You to Sleep! (2009). And has recently released his first comedy CD Things I think, I think (2013)

name: Gary Owen
bio: Gary Owen is a stand-up comedian and actor. Named Funniest Servicemember by the military, he's appeared on BET's Comic View and has multiple specials. Known for his comedy about his interracial marriage and family.

name: Deon Cole
bio: Deon Cole is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He played Charlie on Black-ish and Grown-ish and was a writer on Conan. He has a Netflix special Cole Hearted and performs at clubs across the country.

name: Tiffany Haddish
bio: Tiffany Haddish is a stand-up comedian and actress. She broke out in Girls Trip and has starred in multiple films. She won a Grammy for her comedy album and has Netflix specials. Known for her high-energy, personal storytelling.

name: Leslie Jones
bio: Leslie Jones is a stand-up comedian and actress. She was a cast member on SNL from 2014-2019 and starred in Ghostbusters (2016). She hosted the Supermarket Sweep reboot and continues to perform stand-up.

name: Cedric the Entertainer
bio: Cedric the Entertainer is a stand-up comedian and actor. He was one of the Original Kings of Comedy and has starred in multiple TV shows and films including The Neighborhood on CBS. A comedy legend.

name: Tracy Morgan
bio: Tracy Morgan is a stand-up comedian and actor. He starred on 30 Rock and SNL and has appeared in multiple films. He returned to comedy after a devastating car accident and has a Netflix special Staying Alive.

name: Craig Robinson
bio: Craig Robinson is a stand-up comedian, actor, and musician. He played Darryl on The Office and has starred in multiple films including Hot Tub Time Machine. He performs stand-up at clubs across the country.

name: Ken Jeong
bio: Ken Jeong is a stand-up comedian, actor, and former physician. He starred as Mr. Chow in The Hangover trilogy and Ben Chang on Community. He's a judge on The Masked Singer and performs stand-up live.

name: Kumail Nanjiani
bio: Kumail Nanjiani is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He co-wrote and starred in The Big Sick, starred in Silicon Valley, and appeared in Marvel's Eternals. He performs stand-up at clubs across the country.

name: Jerrod Carmichael
bio: Jerrod Carmichael is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. His HBO special Rothaniel, where he came out as gay, won an Emmy. He created The Carmichael Show and hosted SNL.

name: Martin Lawrence
bio: Martin Lawrence is a stand-up comedian and actor. He starred in the iconic sitcom Martin and the Bad Boys franchise with Will Smith. His comedy specials and films have made him one of the most successful comedians in history.

name: Sinbad
bio: Sinbad is a stand-up comedian and actor known for his clean, family-friendly comedy. He starred in multiple films and TV shows including A Different World. A beloved figure in comedy for decades.

name: Sarah Silverman
bio: Sarah Silverman is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. She starred in The Sarah Silverman Program and has multiple HBO and Netflix specials. Known for her boundary-pushing comedy about taboo subjects.

name: Marc Maron
bio: Marc Maron is a stand-up comedian, podcaster, and actor. His WTF podcast is one of the most influential podcasts ever, featuring interviews with presidents and comedy legends. He starred in GLOW and has multiple specials.

name: Bill Hader
bio: Bill Hader is a comedian, actor, and writer. He was a cast member on SNL and created and starred in Barry on HBO, winning multiple Emmy Awards. One of the most talented performer-writers in comedy.

name: Mike Birbiglia
bio: Mike Birbiglia is a stand-up comedian, filmmaker, and actor. His one-man shows including Sleepwalk with Me and The New One have played on Broadway. He's released multiple specials and directed films.

name: Aziz Ansari
bio: Aziz Ansari is a stand-up comedian, actor, and writer. He starred in Parks and Recreation, created and starred in Master of None (winning an Emmy for writing), and has multiple Netflix specials.

name: Margaret Cho
bio: Margaret Cho is a stand-up comedian, actress, and activist. She's been performing for over 30 years and is known for her comedy about race, sexuality, and politics. She's had multiple concert films and specials.

name: Bob Saget
bio: Bob Saget was a stand-up comedian, actor, and TV host. He starred as Danny Tanner on Full House and hosted America's Funniest Home Videos. Known for his surprisingly raunchy stand-up, he passed away in 2022.
bio_wiki: Robert Lane Saget was an American stand-up comedian, actor, director, and television host. He portrayed Danny Tanner on the sitcom Full House (1987–1995) and its sequel Fuller House (2016–2020). Saget was the original host of America's Funniest Home Videos (1989–1997), and the voice of narrator Ted Mosby on the sitcom How I Met Your Mother (2005–2014). He was simultaneously known for his family-friendly image and his profane comedian persona, with his 2014 album That's What I'm Talkin' About being nominated for the Grammy Award for Best Comedy Album.

name: Gilbert Gottfried
bio: Gilbert Gottfried was a stand-up comedian, actor, and voice artist. Known for his distinctive voice and boundary-pushing comedy. He voiced Iago in Aladdin and was an iconic figure in comedy until his passing in 2022.
bio_wiki: Gilbert Jeremy Gottfried was an American stand-up comedian and actor. He was best known for his exaggerated shrill voice, strong New York dialect, his squint, and his edgy, often controversial sense of humor. His numerous roles in film and television included voicing Iago in the Walt Disney Company's Aladdin franchise until his death in 2022, Mister Mxyzptlk in Superman: The Animated Series and Justice League Action, Digit LeBoid in PBS Kids' Cyberchase until his death, Kraang Subprime in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, and the Aflac duck mascot before he was replaced by Daniel McKeague in 2011. He also played Mr. Peabody in the Problem Child franchise, the only actor in the series to reprise his role in all three films as well as the animated television series.

name: Katt Williams
bio: Katt Williams is a stand-up comedian and actor. His special The Pimp Chronicles was a massive hit. He's appeared in multiple films and his Netflix special Woke Foke was one of the most-watched comedy specials.

name: Patrice O'Neal
bio: Patrice O'Neal was a stand-up comedian known for his brilliant, uncompromising comedy. He appeared on Tough Crowd and The Office. Widely regarded as one of the greatest comedians who never got his due mainstream recognition. He passed away in 2011.
bio_wiki: Patrice Lumumba Malcolm O'Neal was an American comedian and actor. He was known for his stand-up comedy career and his regular guest appearances on the talk show Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn and the radio show Opie and Anthony.

name: Conan O'Brien
bio: Conan O'Brien is a comedian, TV host, writer, and podcaster. He hosted Late Night, The Tonight Show, and Conan. His podcast Conan O'Brien Needs a Friend is one of the most popular podcasts. A Harvard Lampoon president who became a comedy icon.

name: Stephen Colbert
bio: Stephen Colbert is a comedian, TV host, and writer. He hosted The Colbert Report and is the current host of The Late Show. His satirical character and sharp wit have made him one of the most important comedians in America.

name: Seth Meyers
bio: Seth Meyers is a comedian, TV host, and writer. He's the host of Late Night with Seth Meyers and was the head writer and Weekend Update anchor on SNL. Known for his political comedy and A Closer Look segment.

name: Jon Stewart
bio: Jon Stewart is a comedian, TV host, writer, and activist. He hosted The Daily Show for 16 years, transforming political comedy. He returned to host The Daily Show weekly segments. A Comedy Cellar regular in his early career.

name: Tina Fey
bio: Tina Fey is a comedian, actress, writer, and producer. She was the first female head writer of SNL, created 30 Rock and Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt, and starred in Mean Girls. One of the most influential comedy writers ever.

name: Eddie Murphy
bio: Eddie Murphy is one of the greatest comedians and actors of all time. His stand-up specials Delirious and Raw are legendary. He starred in Beverly Hills Cop, Coming to America, The Nutty Professor, and Shrek.

name: George Lopez
bio: George Lopez is a stand-up comedian, actor, and TV host. He starred in George Lopez and Lopez vs. Lopez. He's released multiple HBO specials and is one of the most popular Latino comedians in history.

name: Tig Notaro
bio: Tig Notaro is a stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. Her set about being diagnosed with cancer became legendary and was released as a Grammy-nominated album. She starred in Star Trek: Discovery and has multiple HBO specials.

name: Nathan Fielder
bio: Nathan Fielder is a comedian, writer, director, and actor. He created Nathan for You and The Rehearsal on HBO. His unique blend of cringe comedy and social experiments has made him one of the most innovative comedians working.

name: Eric Andre
bio: Eric Andre is a comedian, actor, and TV host. He created and hosts The Eric Andre Show on Adult Swim and starred in Bad Trip on Netflix. Known for his chaotic, confrontational comedy style.

name: D.L. Hughley
bio: D.L. Hughley is a stand-up comedian, actor, and radio host. He was one of the Original Kings of Comedy and has starred in multiple TV shows. He hosts a nationally syndicated radio show.

name: Steve Harvey
bio: Steve Harvey is a comedian, TV host, and author. He was one of the Original Kings of Comedy, hosts Family Feud and the Miss Universe pageant, and has a nationally syndicated radio show. One of the most recognizable entertainers in the world.

name: Jeff Dunham
bio: Jeff Dunham is a ventriloquist and stand-up comedian. He's one of the highest-grossing comedians in the world with his puppet characters including Achmed the Dead Terrorist. His specials have been watched by hundreds of millions.

name: Tommy Tiernan
bio: Tommy Tiernan is an Irish stand-up comedian and TV host. He hosts The Tommy Tiernan Show and is one of the most popular comedians in Ireland and the UK. He performs internationally to sold-out crowds.

name: Jimmy Carr
bio: Jimmy Carr is a British stand-up comedian and TV host. Known for his dark one-liners and audience roasting, he hosts 8 Out of 10 Cats and has multiple Netflix specials. One of the biggest comedians in the UK.

name: Ricky Gervais
bio: Ricky Gervais is a British comedian, actor, writer, and director. He created The Office, Extras, and After Life. He's hosted the Golden Globes multiple times and has Netflix specials. One of the most influential comedians of the 21st century.

name: James Acaster
bio: James Acaster is a British stand-up comedian. His Netflix series Repertoire (4 specials) was a critical hit. He's appeared on numerous British panel shows and his book Classic Scrapes is a bestseller.

name: Daniel Sloss
bio: Daniel Sloss is a Scottish stand-up comedian. His Netflix specials Dark and Jigsaw went viral, with Jigsaw reportedly causing over 120,000 breakups and 300 divorces. He tours internationally.

name: Trevor Wallace
bio: Trevor Wallace is a stand-up comedian and content creator. His comedy sketches have gone viral with billions of views. He performs at clubs and theaters across the country.

name: Fahim Anwar
bio: Fahim Anwar is a stand-up comedian and actor. A former aerospace engineer, he's appeared on Conan, @midnight, and in multiple TV shows. He performs at clubs across the country.

name: Chris D'Elia
bio: Chris D'Elia is a stand-up comedian, actor, and podcaster. He starred in Whitney and Undateable and hosts the Congratulations podcast. He's released multiple Netflix specials.

name: Jo Koy
bio: Jo Koy is a stand-up comedian. His Netflix specials about his Filipino-American family have been massive hits. He's sold out arenas across the country and is one of the most popular touring comedians.

name: Desi Lydic
bio: Desi Lydic is a stand-up comedian and actress. She's a correspondent on The Daily Show and hosted Desi Lydic Foxsplains on Comedy Central. She performs stand-up at clubs and theaters.

name: Bridget Everett
bio: Bridget Everett is a stand-up comedian, singer, actress, and writer. She created and starred in Somebody Somewhere on HBO. Known for her outrageous cabaret-style performances.

name: Ian Edwards
bio: Ian Edwards is a stand-up comedian and writer. He's written for multiple TV shows and performs at clubs across the country. Known for his smart, laid-back comedy style.

name: Vinny Chapman
bio: Vinny 'The Dancing Ump' Chapman is a stand-up comedian and entertainer performing in New York City.

name: Roast Battle League
bio: The Roast Battle League comes to The Comedy Cellar for the first time. Comics from all over the globe will go head-to-head with four battles lined up, nothing is off-limits, and no ego is safe. Come see the first sport that’s also a comedy show live in the Mecca of ball busting and trash talking. Let’s Roast!
